case_title: 754 POST STREET SAN FRANCISCO LLC VS. PHILIP JOSEPH BOUCHARD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-12-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. *** DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JPT*** PLAINTIFF 754 POST STREET SAN FRANCISCO LLC IS PRESENT. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,926.01 FILED BY 754 POST STREET SAN FRANCISCO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOUCHARD, PHILIP JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-23-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF 754 POST STREET SAN FRANCISCO LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN LOWELL, CO-MANAGER/PARTNER. DEFENDANT PHILIP JOSEPH BOUCHARD IS PRESENT. WHILE WAITING FOR A JUDGE TO HEAR THEIR CASE (DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE, PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY 23, 2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
